---
title: "Architecture Decision Records"
subtitle: "Index of UIAO architectural decisions"
---

::: {.callout-note}
## Page in preparation
The UIAO ADR corpus lives in `src/uiao/canon/adr/`. See the [ADR index on GitHub](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/tree/main/src/uiao/canon/adr) for the current list of decision records.
:::
